title: delphinium bicornutum subsp. oaxacanum
intro: Delphinium bicornutum subsp. oaxacanum, a rare and lesser-known subspecies of the Delphinium genus, is a flowering plant native to Mexico. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Delphinium bicornutum subsp. oaxacanum include relief from muscle spasms, menstrual cramps, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
